## Status: PASS — Task 1.5 complete

### Files

- Created: `C:\work\mega\memory\.claude\worktrees\feat-transcript-ingest\tests\AstraMemory.Tests\Controllers\TranscriptIngestControllerTests.cs`
- Modified: `C:\work\mega\memory\.claude\worktrees\feat-transcript-ingest\src\AstraMemory.Application\DependencyInjection.cs`

### Build / Test Output
- TDD red phase verified: pre-controller test run failed with `error CS0246: The type or namespace name 'TranscriptIngestController' could not be found`.
- Controller tests after implementation: 4/4 passed (Duration 79 ms).
- Regression check on Scrubber + IdempotencyCache + IngestService: 11/11 passed (Duration 69 ms).
- Build clean (only pre-existing NU1507 / NU1903 / CS0618 warnings unrelated to this work).

### Commit
- SHA: `88d9c677`
- Message: `feat(api): TranscriptIngestController POST /ingest/transcript`
- Branch: `feat/transcript-ingest` (HEAD now `88d9c677`, previous HEAD `d2561f67`)
- 3 files changed, 191 insertions

### Self-Review
- Route `/ingest/transcript` via `[Route("ingest/transcript")]` + `[HttpPost]`.
- Rejects `AuthMethod=="apikey"` (case-insensitive) with `401 Unauthorized` before invoking the service (verified by Moq `Times.Never`).
- Empty/null `turns` → `400 BadRequest` with `{ error = "turns required" }`.
- Per-turn UTF-8 byte cap at 8 KiB → truncated to `<=8192 chars> + "…[truncated]"` (test passes the length and suffix assertions).
- Array cap at 200 turns: keep newest tail via `Skip(turns.Count - MaxTurns)`.
- DI: `IdempotencyCache` as **singleton** (shared in-memory cache), `ITranscriptIngestService → TranscriptIngestService` as **scoped**, registered inside `AddMemoryServiceApplication` before `return services;`.
- Body maps `IngestTranscriptRequest` → `TranscriptIngestCommand` (incl. `IdempotencyKey` from `Idempotency-Key` header) and projects `TranscriptIngestResult` → `IngestTranscriptResponse` with `ScrubHits(client, server)`.
- Returns 200 OK per Phase 1 spec (synchronous; no 202).
- Commit touches exactly 3 files.

### Concerns
None blocking. Note: API project still emits a pre-existing `CS0618` warning on `AdminAuthHelper.ValidateBearerJwtRole` (FEAT-207 obsolete shim) — not introduced by this slice.
